service: IVX AI Chat Room / IVX Owner AI
bug: IVX AI runtime is not configured
rootCause: AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY was missing from the deployed Render backend (api.ivxholding.com). The error originated at backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts ensureIVXAIGatewayEnvironment() when the backend tried to route owner-room and public-chat requests through the Vercel AI Gateway without a bearer token.

renderEnvVars.AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY: set to rork_sk_*** (Rork toolkit key) on service srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0
renderEnvVars.IVX_AI_GATEWAY_URL: set to https://toolkit.rork.com/text/llm/ so the runtime routes directly to the Rork toolkit instead of the Vercel gateway

fixApplied.repoCode: backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts was updated to make the Rork toolkit a first-class fallback candidate and to accept a rork_sk key when AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY is missing.
fixApplied.repoEnv: expo/.env was cleaned of corrupted pasted-terminal-output values for SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, IVX_SUPABASE_URL, GITHUB_REPO_URL, RENDER_API_KEY, RENDER_SERVICE_ID, and IVX_OWNER_TOKEN.

publicChat.answer: IVXHOLDINGS is a real-estate and capital-investment company founded and owned by Ivan Perez...

ownerAI.answer: I was created by Ivan Perez, the owner and founder of IVXHOLDINGS...

ownerAI_originalQuestion.answer: I do not have access to your personal identity, legal name, or account profile information...
ownerAI_originalQuestion.note: The IVX AI runtime is now operational. The answer content is a model response, not the previous 'IVX AI runtime is not configured' error.

conclusion: The IVX AI chat room and IVX Owner AI are live and answering owner/investor questions. The runtime is no longer throwing the 'IVX AI runtime is not configured' error. The backend is routing AI requests through the Rork toolkit using the configured key.
